task_completion.description: Verify the original case title is changed to 'Noise Violation - 42 Oak St'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A case record is visible with the title or subject field set to 'Noise Violation - 42 Oak St'.

task_completion.description: Verify the original case description is modified to include only the noise and drum allegations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field of the 'Noise Violation' case shows text about noise and drums, and no longer contains mentions of trash, rats, or sanitation issues.

task_completion.description: Verify a new case is created with the title 'Sanitation Hazard - 42 Oak St'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate case record is visible with the title or subject field set to 'Sanitation Hazard - 42 Oak St'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new case description contains the exact required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field of the 'Sanitation Hazard' case reads exactly: 'Large pile of rotting trash in driveway attracting rats.'

task_completion.description: Verify the two cases are linked using the 'Related' relationship type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Related Cases', 'Linked Records', or similar structural UI section shows the other case (e.g., the Noise case shows the Sanitation case as related, or vice versa) with a 'Related' relationship type.

task_completion.description: Verify a note is added to the original noise case stating the issue was split.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A note, comment, or activity log entry on the 'Noise Violation' case explicitly states: 'Sanitation issue split to new case [New Case Number]' (where [New Case Number] is the actual ID of the newly created case).

integrity.description: The agent used the case management graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or standard case management application UI being used, not a terminal window, API client, or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and modified records in the system rather than mocking them up.
integrity.visual_evidence: System-generated case numbers, standard form fields, save buttons, and UI confirmation messages are visible, rather than text typed into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the system's built-in linking feature rather than just typing the relationship in a plain text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The relationship between the two cases is shown in a dedicated structural UI element for linked/related records, distinct from the plain text note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original case title must be updated to 'Noise Violation - 42 Oak St'. The new case title must be 'Sanitation Hazard - 42 Oak St'. The address '42 Oak St' is confirmed correct. The original case description should retain mentions of 'drums' and noise, but must have mentions of 'trash' and 'rats' removed.
